---
title: "Getting Started"
---

## What to do before the workshop

Please complete the **Intro to R for Decision Modeling** modules by **June 25, 2026**. These modules may take **2-8 hours**, depending on your familiarity with R.

## Required software

Please install the following before the workshop:

- R
- RStudio Desktop or Positron
- Quarto
- Git, optional but recommended

## Recommended R packages

```{r}
#| eval: false
install.packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "dampack",
  "heemod",
  "hesim",
  "BCEA",
  "flexsurv",
  "here",
  "knitr",
  "rmarkdown"
))
```

## Repository setup

You can either:

1. Download the workshop materials as a ZIP file from GitHub, or
2. Clone the repository using Git.

```bash
git clone https://github.com/YOUR-GITHUB-USERNAME/YOUR-REPOSITORY-NAME.git
```

## Online coding backup

If local installation is difficult, instructors may provide one of the following:

- Posit Cloud project
- GitHub Codespaces
- Binder

Add links here when available.
